title: ANC - Change Transparency Mode value (Environment/Speech)
scenario: Transparency Mode sub-setting (Environment/Speech) selection does not persist after closing and reopening the ANC tab
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and tap on your connected Poly Bluetooth audio device.
3. Go to Device Settings → Audio Settings → ANC.
4. In the ANC settings, locate the Transparency Mode option.
5. Change the Transparency Mode value from the current setting to 'Environment'.
6. Close the ANC tab by navigating back to the Audio Settings screen.
7. Re-open the ANC tab by tapping on ANC again.
8. Observe the Transparency Mode value displayed.
9. Repeat steps 5–8, this time changing the Transparency Mode value to 'Speech' instead of 'Environment'.
expected: The Transparency Mode value (Environment or Speech) selected in step 5 or step 9 persists and is displayed correctly when re-opening the ANC tab.
